ddt:Target.Name: X95 CAREG V3
ddt:Target.Description:
Date :12 février 2008
Version V3 pour version soft supérieur à 10.00 Pilote Developpement Electronique : B. Gillot Tel: 57881
Evolution par rapport à V2:
- Ajout de 3 pays pour la config CL_CountryCfg - Correction longueur de la data VIN - correction du parametre de pilotage de l'IOControl stepper Distribution - correction des noms des datas et des requetes lié aux service $2E et $22 ( DID) - Ajout de 2 compresseurs dans CL_CompType - Ajout K, R et H 95 dans CL_VehicleType - correction du format de la variable StatusOfDTC - ajout request ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage - renommage request 2180 en DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2 - suppression de la request $117FF00

Data.Name: MemorySizeToBeRead
Data.Comment: Must be <7

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: APV Session (Assembly Line testing an After-Sales)

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Numero de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Item.Text: Ignition ON and Engine ready to start

Data.Name: D_OH_ACUnderloadStatus
Data.Comment: Flag état sous charge boucle froide

Item.Text: APV Session (Assembly Line testing an After-Sales)

Data.Name: CL_VehicleType
Data.Comment: configuration du type de caisse

Data.Name: CL_ACType
Data.Comment: configuration du type de climatisation

Data.Name: CL_PTCType
Data.Comment: configuration de la puissance des CTP

Data.Name: CL_CountryCfg
Data.Comment: configuration de la zone climatique

Data.Name: CL_Steering
Data.Comment: configuration de la position du conducteur

Data.Name: CL_CompType
Data.Comment: configuration du type de compresseur

Data.Name: CL_CompPulleyRatio
Data.Comment: configuration du rapport d'entrainement du compresseur

Data.Name: CL_WithEvapSensor
Data.Comment: configuration de la presence de la sonde evaporateur

Data.Name: CL_WithSolarSensor
Data.Comment: configuration de la presence du capteur d'ensoleillement

Data.Name: CL_WithAirQualitySensor
Data.Comment: configuration de la presence du capteur de toxicite

Data.Name: CL_WindshieldType
Data.Comment: configuration du type de pare-brise

Data.Name: CL_WithLINBus
Data.Comment: configuration de la presence du bus LIN

Data.Name: CL_WithHumiditySensor
Data.Comment: configuration de la presence du capteur d'humidite

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: OutputControl.Status
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Stop
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Label.Text: This service is available only in Developpement session

Button.Text: Write Renault Kit Assembly Part Number
Read Renault Kit Assembly Part Number
